entities.name: ENTREPRENEURSHIP
entities.description: The process of designing, launching and running a new business, which plays a transformational role in socio-economic development

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the economic and social conditions of a society

entities.name: INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS
entities.description: New and creative ways to address local issues

entities.name: LOCAL ISSUES
entities.description: Specific problems occurring within a local context that entrepreneurs seek to address

entities.name: CREATIVE DESTRUCTION
entities.description: The process of industrial mutation that incessantly revolutionizes the economic structure from within, destroying the status quo

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: The state of having paid work

entities.name: INCOME GENERATION
entities.description: The process of creating a source of money for individuals or communities

entities.name: LOCAL ECONOMIC GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the capacity of a local economy to produce goods and services

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE CLUSTERS
entities.description: Geographic concentrations of interconnected companies, specialized suppliers, and service providers

entities.name: NATIONAL COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of a nation to produce goods and services that meet the test of international markets
